name: SHORT EXPIR-CLEARANCE: Bonnie Adult Cat Food - Cocktail 1.5kg
description: Bonnie Cocktail Adult Cat food , full-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Chicken meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer?s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................. 32% Fat ..................... 12% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) . 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (Chicken), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
